---
name: Palette or role change
about: Propose adjusting a colour's role (or, rarely, its hex)
title: "palette: "
labels: ["palette"]
---

## Type of change

- [ ] **Role tweak** — the hex is fine, but it's applied to the wrong UI
  element (e.g. "use `#9E4421` for X instead of `#C85A2C`"). Fair game.
- [ ] **Hex change** — a canonical palette hex should move. Brand-locked;
  only accepted with a strong rationale (accessibility, measurable
  brand drift).
